ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: New daily notes will be placed here.
ast.target: 新的每日笔记将放置在此处。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: New daily notes will utilize the template file specified.
ast.target: 新的每日笔记将使用指定的模板文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: (Optional) The heading from the template which begins what Obligator will copy. Everything before this heading in your note will be ignored. If left blank, Obligator will copy from the beginning of the file.
ast.target: （可选）模板中开始 Obligator 将复制内容的标题。笔记中此标题之前的所有内容将被忽略。如果留空，Obligator 将从文件开头开始复制。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: (Optional) The heading from the template which terminates what Obligator will copy. Everything after this heading in your note will be ignored. If left blank, Obligator will copy to the end of the file.
ast.target: （可选）模板中结束 Obligator 将复制内容的标题。笔记中此标题之后的所有内容将被忽略。如果留空，Obligator 将复制到文件末尾。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open your Obligator note automatically when you open this vault.
ast.target: 当您打开此库时，自动打开您的 Obligator 笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Enabling this will move the previous to-do note into the
					 directory specified when a new note is created. The note
					 will be renamed according to the date format specified.
ast.target: 启用此选项后，当创建新笔记时，之前的待办笔记将被移动到指定的目录。笔记将根据指定的日期格式重命名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Archived notes will be moved here.
ast.target: 归档的笔记将移动到此处。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
If this is enabled, obligator will automatically delete
					 headings which don't have any non-whitespace children when
					 you create a new daily note. Turning this off will leave
					 all headings untouched, even if they have no contents.
ast.target: 如果启用此选项，当您创建新的每日笔记时，obligator 将自动删除没有任何非空白子元素的标题。关闭此选项将保留所有标题不变，即使它们没有内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
This prevents the setting above from deleting any
					 headings which are present in the template
ast.target: 这可以防止上述设置删除模板中存在的任何标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
To-dos which are children of other to-dos will not be
					 deleted unless the parent is checked, and all of its
					 children are too. This setting would be used if you want
					 to retain checked to-dos until the whole structure is
					 checked.
ast.target: 作为其他待办事项子项的待办事项，除非父项被勾选，并且其所有子项也被勾选，否则不会被删除。如果您希望保留已勾选的待办事项直到整个结构都被勾选，可以使用此设置。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 启动时打开 Obligator 笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Only delete to-dos when parent is complete
ast.target: 仅在父项完成时删除待办事项

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You must specify a note path in the settings.
ast.target: 您必须在设置中指定笔记路径。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You must specify a template file in the settings.
ast.target: 您必须在设置中指定模板文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The initial heading must preceed the terminal heading. Aborting.
ast.target: 初始标题必须位于终止标题之前。操作中止。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The archive path must be specified when the archive option is turned on, aborting.
ast.target: 当归档选项开启时，必须指定归档路径，操作中止。
